business_thesis: Convergence should advance only when the demo proves product value, technical repeatability, and review readiness in the same artifact.
architecture_findings: The gate should remain before market-bound build starts, not after implementation drift accumulates.
accuracy_eval_findings: The test count is visible in the UI and must be refreshed if coverage changes materially.
scalability_findings: Current scope is demo-grade; production intake, auth, audit trails, and dataset governance remain future gates.
frontend_design_findings: The proof band supports review discipline by making readiness claims inspectable at the top of the experience.

blockers: state.dynamics is fetched but never read — §03 discriminator and §04 scorecard never render
resolved: state.dynamics is fetched but never read — §03 discriminator and §04 scorecard never render

recommendation_to_claude: Approve as professional demo readiness, with productionization held behind the next explicit gate.
